title: Extra Large Adult Nappy Bags - 160 Pack, 110% Bigger & 20% Thicker Sacks, Easy Tie Handles, Made from 100% Recycled Plastic, Odour Free, Discreet Black, Strong Sanitary Disposal Bag
features: EXTRA-LARGE SIZE: Measuring 11 x 17 x 21 inches, our nappy bags are designed to accommodate larger incontinence products. They can comfortably hold up to 3-4 adult nappies or other sanitary waste. With a height of 21 inches (53cm), a width of 11 inches (28cm), and a width with side gussets of 17 inches (43cm), they offer even more space for convenient and secure nappy disposal.

STRONGER: Our high-quality nappy bags are manufactured from premium polyethylene plastic, offering a superior solution that is 20mu thick, providing strength and durability. These unscented and odour-free nappy sacks are designed to handle heavier loads with ease, ensuring reliable disposal every time.

DISCREET AND SECURE: Made from black, opaque material, these nappy sacks ensure full discretion when disposing of incontinence pads, stoma waste, or other sanitary items. Rest assured that your privacy is fully protected.

LONG HANDLES: Our extra-large nappy bags feature long handles, making it even easier to tie and securely carry them to the bin. Whether at home, outdoors, or traveling, these bags provide a hygienic and practical solution for incontinence disposal.

ECO-FRIENDLY: Crafted from 100% recycled polyethylene material, our disposable incontinence bags are an environmentally conscious choice. By opting for our nappy bags, you support sustainability, as recycling polyethylene consumes about half the energy required for incineration disposal.
